---
title: Plotting chromosomal location of upregulated genes in UBC subclusters
date: 2024-10-23
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To determine (1) if the upregulated genes in the UBC subclusters cluster together in the genome in "hotspots", and (2) if any upregulated genes are known MB drivers.


## Files and directories

### Code

The code can be found in this document. Differential gene expression was run by Leo (see `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240715`). Upregulated genes are those that have an adjusted p-value < 0.05 and a log2FC > 0 in both Aldinger and Sepp (see notes from 2024-08-27).

### Output

The output can be found in `<integrated results directory>/20241023`.


## Results

Load packages and files:

```{r}
#| cache: false
#| cache-lazy: false

library(tidyverse)
# library(patchwork)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(grid)
library(circlize)

out_dir <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/integrated/20241023"

# load top upregulated markers in each cluster across both datasets (Aldinger/Sepp)
ranked_markers <- readRDS("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/integrated/20240827/diff_expr_markers/cluster_marker_ranking.rds")
```

Show some of the upregulated genes in UBC_1 and UBC_2:

```{r}
head(ranked_markers$UBC_1, n = 10)
head(ranked_markers$UBC_2, n = 10)
```

### Plot location of genes on genome

Retrieve coordinates of the upregulated genes:

```{r}
# load GENCODE annotations
gencode <- rtracklayer::import("/.mounts/labs/pailab/src/gencode/GRCh38/gencode.v42.basic.annotation.gtf") %>% 
  as.data.frame(.) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(type == "gene")

# get coordinates of upregulated genes
gene_coords <- map(
  .x = names(ranked_markers),
  .f = \(subcluster) {
    upreg_genes <- ranked_markers[[subcluster]]$feature
    
    # print message if genes are missing in gencode
    if (length(base::setdiff(upreg_genes, gencode$gene_name)) > 0) {
      message(sprintf(
        "***%s: %s not found in GENCODE v42***",
        subcluster,
        base::setdiff(upreg_genes, gencode$gene_name) %>% paste0(collapse = "/")
      ))
    }

    # filter gencode coordinates for upregulated genes
    df <- gencode %>%
      dplyr::filter(gene_name %in% ranked_markers[[subcluster]]$feature) %>%
      select(c(seqnames, start, end, gene_name)) %>%
      dplyr::rename(chr = seqnames)

    # print message if there are duplicated genes
    if (any(duplicated(df$gene_name))) {
      message(sprintf(
        "***%s: multiple coordinates found for***",
        subcluster,
        df$gene_name[duplicated(df$gene_name)] %>% unique() %>% paste0(collapse = "/")
      ))
    }

    return(df)
  }
) %>%
  setNames(nm = names(ranked_markers))

# save the coordinates
saveRDS(
  gene_coords,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "upreg_genes_coords.rds")
)
```

Make circos plot:

```{r}
#| code-fold: true

png(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "upreg_genes_ideogram.png"),
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  res = 600
)

# set up plotting window for the actual plot
plot.new()
circle_size <- unit(1, "snpc")
pushViewport(viewport(
  x = 0,
  y = 0.5,
  width = circle_size,
  height = circle_size,
  just = c("left", "center")
))
par(omi = gridBase::gridOMI(), new = TRUE)

# layout settings
circos.par("start.degree" = 90)

# plot ideogram with cytobands
circos.initializeWithIdeogram(species = "hg38")

ubc_cols <- scales::pal_hue()(2)
names(ubc_cols) <- paste0("UBC_", c(2:1))

# add tracks for UBC_1/2 genes
walk(
  .x = paste0("UBC_", c(2:1)),
  .f = \(subcluster) {
    circos.genomicTrack(
      data = gene_coords[[subcluster]],
      bg.border = NA,
      track.height = 0.15,
      ylim = c(0, 1),
      panel.fun = \(region, value, ...) {
        circos.genomicRect(
          region,
          value,
          border = ubc_cols[[subcluster]],
          lwd = 0.1,
          ...
        )
      }
    )
  }
)

# change plotting window to add legend
upViewport()

# add legend
lgd <- ComplexHeatmap::Legend(
  at = rev(names(ubc_cols)),
  type = "lines",
  legend_gp = gpar(col = rev(ubc_cols), lwd = 2),
  background = NA,
  title = "UBC\nsubcluster",
  title_position = "topleft"
)
ComplexHeatmap::draw(
  lgd,
  x = circle_size - unit(0.025, "snpc"),
  just = "left"
)

# clear layout settings (for any future plots)
circos.clear()

dev.off()
```

::: {#fig-upreg-genes-ideogram}

![](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/integrated/20241023/upreg_genes_ideogram.png)

Ideogram showing genomic locations of the genes that are upregulated in the UBC_1 and UBC_2 clusters.

:::

### Upregulated genes and MB drivers

The list of Group 4 MB drivers was manually compiled from Fig 1 and Extended Data Fig 2 from Hendrikse et al. (2022). The gene lists can be found in this output directory.

First, load the gene lists:

```{r}
hendrikse_fig1 <- read_lines(
  file = file.path(out_dir, "hendrikse_fig1_g4_mutants.txt")
)
hendrikse_fig1

hendrikse_exfig2 <- read_lines(
  file = file.path(out_dir, "hendrikse_exfig2_g4_drivers.txt")
)
hendrikse_exfig2
```

Combine both gene lists:

```{r}
hendrikse_mb_drivers <- union(hendrikse_fig1, hendrikse_exfig2)
hendrikse_mb_drivers
```

Get intersection of upregulated genes in each cluster and the MB drivers:

```{r}
walk(
  .x = names(ranked_markers),
  .f = \(subcluster) {
    i <- intersect(ranked_markers[[subcluster]]$feature, hendrikse_mb_drivers)
    message(sprintf(
      "%s: %s intersecting gene(s)",
      subcluster,
      length(i)
    ))
    if (!length(i) == 0){
      print(i)
    }
  }
)
```

Show intersection of UBC_1 genes and MB drivers on ideogram:

```{r}
#| code-fold: true

png(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "ubc_1_mb_drivers_ideogram.png"),
  width = 5,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  res = 600
)

# layout settings
circos.par("start.degree" = 90)

# initialize ideogram
circos.initializeWithIdeogram(species = "hg38")

# make ideogram with cytobands
# circos.genomicIdeogram(species = "hg38")
# circos.track(
#   track.index = get.current.track.index(),
#   panel.fun = \(x, y) {
#     circos.genomicAxis(h = "bottom", direction = "inside", labels.facing = "downward")
#   }
# )

# add tracks for UBC_1 upregulated genes
circos.genomicTrack(
  data = gene_coords$UBC_1,
  bg.border = NA,
  track.height = 0.15,
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  panel.fun = \(region, value, ...) {
    circos.genomicRect(
      region,
      value,
      border = ubc_cols["UBC_1"],
      lwd = 0.1,
      ...
    )
  }
)

# add tracks for intersecting MB drivers
circos.genomicLabels(
  bed = gene_coords$UBC_1 %>% filter(gene_name %in% hendrikse_mb_drivers),
  labels.column = 4,
  side = "inside"
)

# clear layout settings (for any future plots)
circos.clear()

dev.off()
```

::: {#fig-ubc1-mb-ideogram}

![](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/integrated/20241023/ubc_1_mb_drivers_ideogram.png)

Ideogram showing genomic locations of the genes that are upregulated in the UBC_1. Upregulated genes that are also MB drivers are labelled.

:::
